svg.text: Step-by-step lifecycle from submission to disbursement
Transaction: insert record + enqueue BankInfoWorker + enqueue AuditWorker
All three steps succeed or all rollback (ACID)
StateMachine.transition/2 validates allowed transitions → Ecto.Multi (update + audit + webhook)
PubSub broadcast → LiveView handle_info → assign + re-render
On every status change: invalidate application cache + listing cache per country
CreditApp MVP - Multi-Country Credit Application Platform
